hypothesis: Authentication requests will be slightly slower, potentially causing a minor increase in API gateway response times, but core functionality should remain intact. Monitoring should show increased latency for calls involving auth-service.

The data-service will experience CPU contention, leading to slower data retrieval and processing. This could cause increased response times for both api-gateway and auth-service, potentially leading to timeouts or increased error rates if data-service requests block too long.

The API gateway will introduce significant delays for all incoming requests, leading to widespread client-side timeouts and a severe degradation of user experience. This could also cause resource exhaustion on the gateway itself as requests pile up.
